'''Ib-Dunn''' was a [[Color/Legends|blue-green]] [[Smotl]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked for [[Soergg Vosadii Bezhin|Soergg]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] in [[Cuipernam]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. He worked as a communications expert<ref name="The Approaching Storm" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], when many worlds left the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] to form the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. When [[Ogomoor]], Soergg's [[Ansionian]] [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]], was on his way to report to Soergg that an [[First skirmish in Cuipernam|ambush]] intended to [[Death/Legends|kill]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]] and her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] had failed, Ib-Dunn stared at him with a look of pity.<ref name="The Approaching Storm" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ib-Dunn first appeared in the [[2002]] novel ''[[The Approaching Storm]]'', written by [[Alan Dean Foster]].<ref name="The Approaching Storm" />
